productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed  Steeple Grey Tshirt
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and distressed graphic print Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this sport themed T-shirt from US Polo. The distressed print on the front pays tribute to polo sport, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims, a tonal jacket and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
